tEn: AWQ: Activation-aware Weight Quantization for LLM Compression and Acceleration
tZh: AWQ：面向大语言模型压缩与加速的激活感知权重量化
sEn: AWQ protects only 1% salient weights by scaling up their channels based on activation distribution, achieving hardware-friendly low-bit quantization without backpropagation.
sZh: AWQ通过基于激活分布缩放显著权重通道，仅保护1%的权重即可大幅降低量化误差，实现无需反向传播的硬件友好型低位量化。
absEn: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed numerous AI applications. On-device LLM is becoming increasingly important: running LLMs locally on edge devices can reduce the cloud computing cost and protect users' privacy. However, the astronomical model size and the limited hardware resource pose significant deployment challenges. We propose Activation-aware Weight Quantization (AWQ), a hardware-friendly approach for LLM low-bit weight-only quantization. AWQ finds that not all weights in an LLM are equally important. Protecting only 1% salient weights can greatly reduce quantization error. To identify salient weight channels, we should refer to the activation distribution, not weights. To avoid the hardware-inefficient mix-precision quantization, we mathematically derive that scaling up the salient channels can reduce the quantization error. AWQ employs an equivalent transformation to scale the salient weight channels to protect them. The scale is determined by collecting the activation statistics offline. AWQ does not rely on any backpropagation or reconstruction, so it generalizes to different domains and modalities without overfitting the calibration set. AWQ outperforms existing work on various language modeling and domain-specific benchmarks (coding and math). Thanks to better generalization, it achieves excellent quantization performance for instruction-tuned LMs and, for the first time, multi-modal LMs. Alongside AWQ, we implement TinyChat, an efficient and flexible inference framework tailored for 4-bit on-device LLM/VLMs. With kernel fusion and platform-aware weight packing, TinyChat offers more than 3x speedup over the Huggingface FP16 implementation on both desktop and mobile GPUs. It also democratizes the deployment of the 70B Llama-2 model on mobile GPUs.
absZh: 大语言模型（LLM）已变革众多AI应用。设备端LLM日益重要：在边缘设备本地运行LLM可降低云计算成本并保护用户隐私。然而，巨大的模型规模和有限的硬件资源带来了显著的部署挑战。我们提出激活感知权重量化（AWQ），一种面向LLM低位仅权重量化的硬件友好方法。AWQ发现并非LLM中所有权重同等重要。仅保护1%的显著权重即可大幅降低量化误差。为识别显著权重通道，应参考激活分布而非权重。为避免硬件低效的混合精度量化，我们通过数学推导得出缩放显著通道可降低量化误差。AWQ采用等价变换缩放显著权重通道以保护它们。缩放因子通过离线收集激活统计信息确定。AWQ不依赖任何反向传播或重构，因此能泛化至不同领域和模态而不过拟合校准集。AWQ在各种语言建模和领域特定基准（编码与数学）上优于现有工作。得益于更好的泛化性，它在指令调优语言模型上实现了出色的量化性能，并首次在多模态语言模型上取得优异效果。伴随AWQ，我们实现了TinyChat，一个专为4位设备端LLM/VLM设计的高效灵活推理框架。通过内核融合和平台感知权重打包，TinyChat在桌面和移动GPU上相比Huggingface FP16实现实现了超过3倍的加速。它还使得70B Llama-2模型在移动GPU上的部署变得普及。

contrib.en: Proposes Activation-aware Weight Quantization (AWQ) for LLM low-bit weight-only quantization.
contrib.zh: 提出激活感知权重量化（AWQ），用于大语言模型的低位权重量化。

contrib.en: Identifies that protecting only 1% salient weights based on activation distribution reduces quantization error.
contrib.zh: 发现仅基于激活分布保护1%的显著权重即可大幅降低量化误差。

contrib.en: Derives a per-channel scaling method to protect salient weights without mixed-precision hardware overhead.
contrib.zh: 推导出逐通道缩放方法，在不引入混合精度硬件开销的前提下保护显著权重。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art quantization performance on language modeling, instruction-tuned, and multi-modal LMs.
contrib.zh: 在语言建模、指令微调及多模态语言模型上取得领先的量化性能。

contrib.en: Implements TinyChat inference framework with 3x+ speedup over FP16 on desktop and mobile GPUs.
contrib.zh: 实现TinyChat推理框架，在桌面和移动GPU上相比FP16实现3倍以上加速。

contrib.en: Enables deployment of 70B Llama-2 on mobile GPU (Jetson Orin) for the first time.
contrib.zh: 首次实现70B Llama-2模型在移动GPU（Jetson Orin）上的部署。

limits.en: AWQ focuses on weight-only quantization; activation quantization is not addressed.
limits.zh: AWQ专注于权重量化，未涉及激活量化。

limits.en: The method requires a small calibration set from pre-training data to avoid overfitting.
limits.zh: 该方法需要从预训练数据中选取小规模校准集以避免过拟合。

limits.en: Performance at INT2 quantization still shows a gap compared to FP16 baseline.
limits.zh: INT2量化性能与FP16基线相比仍存在差距。

limits.en: The scaling search space is limited to a single hyperparameter alpha, which may not be optimal for all layers.
limits.zh: 缩放搜索空间限于单一超参数alpha，可能并非所有层的最优解。

limits.en: Evaluation is primarily on LLaMA and OPT families; other architectures may require further validation.
limits.zh: 评估主要基于LLaMA和OPT系列，其他架构可能需要进一步验证。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) have shown excellent performance on various tasks, but the astronomical model size raises the hardware barrier for serving (memory size) and slows down token generation (memory bandwidth). In this paper, we propose Activation-aware Weight Quantization (AWQ), a hardware-friendly approach for LLM low-bit weight-only quantization. Our method is based on the observation that weights are not equally important: protecting only 1% of salient weights can greatly reduce quantization error. We then propose to search for the optimal per-channel scaling that protects the salient weights by observing the activation, not weights. AWQ does not rely on any backpropagation or reconstruction, so it can well preserve LLMs’ generalization ability on different domains and modalities, without overfitting to the calibration set. AWQ outperforms existing work on various language modeling and domain-specific benchmarks. Thanks to better generalization, it achieves excellent quantization performance for instruction-tuned LMs and, for the first time, multi-modal LMs. Alongside AWQ, we implement an efficient and flexible inference framework tailored for LLMs on the edge, offering more than 3×\times speedup over the Huggingface FP16 implementation on both desktop and mobile GPUs. It also democratizes the deployment of the 70B Llama-2 model on mobile GPU (NVIDIA Jetson Orin 64GB).
items.zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在各种任务上表现出色，但庞大的模型规模提高了服务所需的硬件门槛（内存大小）并减慢了词元生成速度（内存带宽）。本文提出激活感知权重量化（AWQ），一种面向LLM低比特仅权重量化的硬件友好方法。我们的方法基于权重并非同等重要的观察：仅保护1%的显著权重即可大幅降低量化误差。我们进一步提出通过观察激活而非权重来搜索最优的逐通道缩放，以保护显著权重。AWQ不依赖任何反向传播或重构，因此能很好地保留LLM在不同领域和模态上的泛化能力，而不会过拟合到校准集。AWQ在各种语言建模和领域特定基准上优于现有工作。得益于更好的泛化性，它在指令调优语言模型上取得了出色的量化性能，并首次应用于多模态语言模型。伴随AWQ，我们实现了一个高效灵活的推理框架，专为边缘设备上的LLM设计，在桌面和移动GPU上相比Huggingface FP16实现实现了超过3倍的加速。它还使得70B Llama-2模型能够在移动GPU（NVIDIA Jetson Orin 64GB）上部署。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) based on transformers [40] have shown excellent performance on various benchmarks [4, 49, 38, 34]. However, the large model size leads to the high serving costs. For example, GPT-3 has 175B parameters, which is 350GB in FP16, while the latest H100 GPU only has 96GB memory, let alone edge devices.
items.zh: 基于Transformer[40]的大型语言模型（LLM）在各种基准测试中表现出色[4, 49, 38, 34]。然而，大模型规模导致服务成本高昂。例如，GPT-3有175B参数，FP16下为350GB，而最新的H100 GPU仅有96GB内存，更不用说边缘设备了。

items.en: Low-bit weight quantization for LLMs can save memory but is hard. Quantization-aware training (QAT) is not practical due to the high training cost, while post-training quantization (PTQ) suffers from large accuracy degradation under a low-bit setting. The closest work is GPTQ [14], which uses second-order information to perform error compensation. It may over-fit the calibration set during reconstruction, distorting the learned features on out-of-distribution domains (Figure 6), which could be problematic since LLMs are generalist models.
items.zh: LLM的低比特权重量化可以节省内存，但很困难。量化感知训练（QAT）由于训练成本高而不实用，而训练后量化（PTQ）在低比特设置下精度下降严重。最接近的工作是GPTQ[14]，它使用二阶信息进行误差补偿。它可能在重构过程中过拟合校准集，扭曲了在分布外领域学到的特征（图6），这可能是有问题的，因为LLM是通用模型。

items.en: In this paper, we propose Activation-aware Weight Quantization (AWQ), a hardware-friendly low-bit weight-only quantization method for LLMs. Our method is based on the observation that weights are not equally important for LLMs’ performance. There is a small fraction (0.1%-1%) of salient weights; skipping the quantization of these salient weights will significantly reduce the quantization loss (Table 1). To find the salient weight channels, the insight is that we should refer to the activation distribution instead of the weight distribution, despite we are doing weight-only quantization: weight channels corresponding to larger activation magnitudes are more salient since they process more important features. To avoid the hardware-inefficient mixed-precision implementation, we analyze the error from weight quantization and derive that scaling up the salient channels can reduce their relative quantization error (Equation 2). Following the intuition, we designed a per-channel scaling method to automatically search for the optimal scaling that minimizes the quantization error under full-weight quantization. AWQ does not rely on any backpropagation or reconstruction, so it can well preserve LLMs’ generalization ability on various domains and modalities without overfitting to the calibration set. Furthermore, we implemented an efficient serving framework to convert theoretical memory savings from AWQ to practical speedup. Our framework takes advantage of kernel fusion to minimize the inference overhead (e.g., intermediate DRAM access and kernel launch overhead), so that we can better realize the speed up from quantizing linear layers (AWQ is applied to linear layers which consist most of the parameters).
items.zh: 本文提出激活感知权重量化（AWQ），一种硬件友好的低比特仅权重量化方法。我们的方法基于权重对LLM性能并非同等重要的观察。有一小部分（0.1%-1%）显著权重；跳过这些显著权重的量化将显著降低量化损失（表1）。为了找到显著权重通道，关键洞察是应参考激活分布而非权重分布，尽管我们做的是仅权重量化：激活幅度较大的权重通道更显著，因为它们处理更重要的特征。为了避免硬件效率低下的混合精度实现，我们分析了权重量化的误差，并推导出放大显著通道可以降低其相对量化误差（公式2）。基于这一直觉，我们设计了一种逐通道缩放方法，自动搜索最优缩放以最小化全权重量化下的量化误差。AWQ不依赖任何反向传播或重构，因此能很好地保留LLM在不同领域和模态上的泛化能力，而不会过拟合到校准集。此外，我们实现了一个高效的服务框架，将AWQ的理论内存节省转化为实际加速。我们的框架利用内核融合来最小化推理开销（例如中间DRAM访问和内核启动开销），从而更好地实现量化线性层（AWQ应用于包含大部分参数的线性层）带来的加速。

items.en: Experiments show that AWQ outperforms existing work on various tasks for different model families (e.g., LLaMA [38], OPT [49]) and model sizes. Thanks to better generalization, it also achieves good quantization performance for instruction-tuned LMs (e.g., Vicuna) and, for the first time, multi-modal LMs (OpenFlamingo [2]). With our efficient system implementation, we consistently observe a 3.2-3.3×\times average speedup compared to the FP16 implementation by Huggingface across a diverse spectrum of LLMs. Furthermore, it facilitates effortless deployment of the Llama-2-70B model on a single NVIDIA Jetson Orin with 64GB of memory. It also democratizes LLMs with up to 13 billion parameters at an interactive pace of 30 tokens per second on a laptop RTX 4070 GPU with only 8GB of memory.
items.zh: 实验表明，AWQ在不同模型家族（如LLaMA[38]、OPT[49]）和模型规模的各种任务上优于现有工作。得益于更好的泛化性，它在指令调优语言模型（如Vicuna）上取得了良好的量化性能，并首次应用于多模态语言模型（OpenFlamingo[2]）。通过我们高效的系统实现，与Huggingface的FP16实现相比，我们在各种LLM上持续观察到平均3.2-3.3倍的加速。此外，它使得Llama-2-70B模型能够轻松部署在单个64GB内存的NVIDIA Jetson Orin上。它还使得高达130亿参数的LLM能够在仅8GB内存的笔记本电脑RTX 4070 GPU上以每秒30个词元的交互速度运行。

items.en: AWQ has been widely adopted by various open-source LLM serving solutions including FastChat, vLLM, HuggingFace TGI, LMDeploy, etc.
items.zh: AWQ已被各种开源LLM服务解决方案广泛采用，包括FastChat、vLLM、HuggingFace TGI、LMDeploy等。

items.en: Quantization maps a floating-point number into lower-bit integers. It is an effective method to reduce the model size and inference costs of LLMs [9, 14, 47, 46]. In this section, we first propose a weight-only quantization method to improve accuracy without training/regression by protecting more "important" weights. And then develop a data-driven method to search for the optimal scaling that reduces quantization errors (Figure 1).
items.zh: 量化将浮点数映射为低位整数。它是减少LLM模型大小和推理成本的有效方法[9, 14, 47, 46]。本节中，我们首先提出一种仅权重量化方法，通过保护更“重要”的权重来提高精度，无需训练或回归。然后开发一种数据驱动的方法来搜索最优缩放，以减少量化误差（图1）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: We observe that we can find 1% of the salient weights in LLMs by observing the activation distribution (middle). Keeping the salient weights in FP16 can significantly improve the quantized performance (PPL from 43.2 (left) to 13.0 (middle)), but the mixed-precision format is not hardware-efficient. We follow the activation-awareness principle and propose AWQ (right). AWQ performs per-channel scaling to protect the salient weights, leading to reduced quantized error. PPL is measured with OPT-6.7B under INT3-g128 quantization.
items.capZh: 图1：我们观察到，通过观察激活分布（中间），可以找到LLM中1%的显著权重。将显著权重保留在FP16中可以显著提高量化性能（困惑度从43.2（左）降至13.0（中间）），但混合精度格式硬件效率不高。我们遵循激活感知原理，提出AWQ（右）。AWQ执行逐通道缩放以保护显著权重，从而降低量化误差。困惑度在OPT-6.7B上使用INT3-g128量化测量。

full.sec: 2.1 Improving LLM Quantization by Preserving 1% Salient Weights
full.secZh: 2.1 通过保留1%显著权重改进大语言模型量化

items.en: We observe that the weights of LLMs are not equally important: there is a small fraction of salient weights that are much more important for LLMs’ performance compared to others. Skipping the quantization of these salient weights can help bridge the performance degradation due to the quantization loss without any training or regression (Figure 1(b)). To verify the idea, we benchmark the performance of quantized LLMs when skipping part of the weight channels in Table 1. We measured the performance of INT3 quantized models while keeping some ratios of weight channels in FP16. A widely used method to determine the importance of weights is to look at its magnitude or L2subscript𝐿2L_{2}-norm [18, 13]. But we find skipping the weight channels with large norm (i.e., FP16% (based on W)) does not significantly improve the quantized performance, leading to a similar marginal improvement as random selection. Interestingly, selecting weights based on activation magnitude can significantly improve the performance: keeping only 0.1%-1% of the channels corresponding to larger activation significantly improves the quantized performance, even matching a strong reconstruction-based method GPTQ [14]. We hypothesize that the input features with larger magnitudes are generally more important. Keeping the corresponding weights in FP16 can preserve those features, which contributes to better model performance.
items.zh: 我们观察到LLM的权重并非同等重要：有一小部分显著权重对LLM性能比其他权重重要得多。跳过这些显著权重的量化有助于弥补量化损失导致的性能下降，无需任何训练或回归（图1(b)）。为了验证这一想法，我们在表1中测量了跳过部分权重通道时量化LLM的性能。我们测量了INT3量化模型在将部分权重通道保留为FP16时的性能。确定权重重要性的常用方法是查看其幅度或L2范数[18, 13]。但我们发现跳过具有大范数的权重通道（即基于权重的FP16%）并不能显著提高量化性能，其边际改进与随机选择相似。有趣的是，基于激活幅度选择权重可以显著提高性能：仅保留0.1%-1%对应较大激活的通道就能显著提高量化性能，甚至与强重构方法GPTQ[14]相当。我们假设幅度较大的输入特征通常更重要。将相应权重保留在FP16中可以保留这些特征，从而有助于更好的模型性能。

items.en: Limitations: Despite keeping 0.1% of weights in FP16 can improve the quantized performance without a noticeable increase in model size (measured in total bits), such a mixed-precision data type will make the system implementation difficult. We need to come up with a method to protect the important weights without actually keeping them as FP16.
items.zh: 局限性：尽管将0.1%的权重保留在FP16中可以在不明显增加模型大小（以总比特数衡量）的情况下提高量化性能，但这种混合精度数据类型会使系统实现变得困难。我们需要提出一种方法来保护重要权重，而不实际将它们保留为FP16。

full.sec: 2.2 Protecting Salient Weights by Activation-aware Scaling
full.secZh: 2.2 通过激活感知缩放保护显著权重

items.en: We propose an alternative method to reduce the quantization error of the salient weight by per-channel scaling, which does not suffer from the hardware inefficiency issue.
items.zh: 我们提出一种替代方法，通过逐通道缩放来减少显著权重的量化误差，该方法不存在硬件效率低下的问题。

items.en: Analyzing the quantization error. We start by analyzing the error from weight-only quantization. Consider a group/block of weight 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w}; the linear operation can be written as y=𝐰𝐱𝑦𝐰𝐱y=\mathbf{w}\mathbf{x}, and the quantized counterpart is y=Q​(𝐰)​𝐱𝑦𝑄𝐰𝐱y=Q(\mathbf{w})\mathbf{x}. Specifically, the quantization function is defined as:
items.zh: 分析量化误差。我们从分析仅权重量化的误差开始。考虑一组/块权重w；线性运算可以写为y=wx，量化后的对应形式为y=Q(w)x。具体地，量化函数定义为：

items.en: where N𝑁N is the number of quantization bits, and ΔΔ\Delta is the quantization scaler determined by the absolute maximum value. Now consider a weight element w∈𝐰𝑤𝐰w\in\mathbf{w}, if we multiply w𝑤w with s>1𝑠1s>1 and the inversely scale x𝑥x, we will have Q​(w⋅s)​(x/s)𝑄⋅𝑤𝑠𝑥𝑠Q(w\cdot s)(x/s), which is:
items.zh: 其中N是量化比特数，Δ是由绝对最大值确定的量化缩放因子。现在考虑一个权重元素w∈w，如果我们将w乘以s>1并反向缩放x，我们将得到Q(w·s)(x/s)，即：

items.en: where Δ′superscriptΔ′\Delta^{{}^{\prime}} is the new quantization scaler after applying s𝑠s. We empirically find that: (1) The expected error from Round​(⋅)Round⋅\text{Round}(\cdot) (denoted as R​o​u​n​d​E​r​r𝑅𝑜𝑢𝑛𝑑𝐸𝑟𝑟RoundErr) does not vary: since the round function maps a floating-point number to an integer, the error is roughly uniformly distributed from 0-0.5, resulting in an average error of 0.25; (2) Scaling up a single element w𝑤w usually does not change the extreme value from the group 𝐰𝐰\mathbf{w}. Therefore we have Δ′≈ΔsuperscriptΔ′Δ\Delta^{{}^{\prime}}\approx\Delta; (3) The error from equation 2 can be expressed as E​r​r′=Δ′⋅R​o​u​n​d​E​r​r⋅1s𝐸𝑟superscript𝑟′⋅⋅superscriptΔ′𝑅𝑜𝑢𝑛𝑑𝐸𝑟𝑟1𝑠Err^{{}^{\prime}}=\Delta^{{}^{\prime}}\cdot RoundErr\cdot\frac{1}{s}, the ratio compared to the original error R​o​u​n​d​E​r​r𝑅𝑜𝑢𝑛𝑑𝐸𝑟𝑟RoundErr is Δ′Δ⋅1s⋅superscriptΔ′Δ1𝑠\frac{\Delta^{{}^{\prime}}}{\Delta}\cdot\frac{1}{s}. Given Δ′≈ΔsuperscriptΔ′Δ\Delta^{{}^{\prime}}\approx\Delta and s>1𝑠1s>1, the relative error is smaller for the salient weight w𝑤w.
items.zh: 其中Δ'是应用s后的新量化缩放因子。我们经验发现：(1) Round(·)的期望误差（记为RoundErr）不变：由于取整函数将浮点数映射为整数，误差大致均匀分布在0-0.5之间，平均误差为0.25；(2) 放大单个元素w通常不会改变组w的极值。因此我们有Δ'≈Δ；(3) 公式2的误差可表示为Err'=Δ'·RoundErr·1/s，与原始误差RoundErr的比值为Δ'/Δ·1/s。由于Δ'≈Δ且s>1，显著权重w的相对误差更小。

items.en: To verify the idea, we multiply the 1% salient channels with s>1𝑠1s>1 for the OPT-6.7B model, and measure the change in ΔΔ\Delta for each group in Table 2. We find that scaling up the salient channels is quite effective: the perplexity improves from 23.54 for s=1𝑠1s=1 (simply RTN) to 11.92 for s=2𝑠2s=2. As s𝑠s goes larger, the percentage of changed ΔΔ\Delta generally gets larger, but the proportion is still quite small for s<2𝑠2s<2; the relative error for the salient channels continues to go smaller as s𝑠s increases. Nonetheless, the best PPL actually appears at s=2𝑠2s=2. This is because if we use a very large s𝑠s, it will increase the relative error for the non-salient channels when ΔΔ\Delta increases (the error of non-salient channels will be amplified by Δ′ΔsuperscriptΔ′Δ\frac{\Delta^{{}^{\prime}}}{\Delta}, and the ratio is larger than 1 for 21.2% of the channels under s=4𝑠4s=4), which can damage the model’s overall accuracy. Therefore, we need to also consider the error from the non-salient channels when protecting salient ones.
items.zh: 为了验证这一想法，我们将OPT-6.7B模型的1%显著通道乘以s>1，并测量表2中每组Δ的变化。我们发现放大显著通道非常有效：困惑度从s=1（简单RTN）的23.54提高到s=2的11.92。随着s增大，Δ变化的百分比通常增大，但对于s<2，比例仍然很小；显著通道的相对误差随着s增大而继续减小。尽管如此，最佳困惑度实际上出现在s=2。这是因为如果使用非常大的s，当Δ增大时，非显著通道的相对误差会增加（非显著通道的误差将被Δ'/Δ放大，在s=4下，21.2%的通道该比值大于1），这可能会损害模型的整体精度。因此，在保护显著通道时，我们还需要考虑非显著通道的误差。

items.en: Searching to scale. To consider both salient and non-salient weights, we choose to automatically search for an optimal (per input channel) scaling factor that minimizes the output difference after quantization for a certain layer. Formally, we want to optimize the following objective:
items.zh: 搜索缩放。为了同时考虑显著和非显著权重，我们选择自动搜索最优的（每个输入通道）缩放因子，以最小化量化后某层的输出差异。形式上，我们希望优化以下目标：

items.en: Here Q𝑄Q means the weight quantization function (e.g., INT3/INT4 quantization with group size 128), 𝐖𝐖\mathbf{W} is the original weights in FP16, and 𝐗𝐗\mathbf{X} is the input features cached from a small calibration set (we take a small calibration set from he pre-training dataset in order not to overfit to a specific task). 𝐬𝐬\mathbf{s} is a per-(input) channel scaling factor; for 𝐬−𝟏⋅𝐗⋅superscript𝐬1𝐗\mathbf{s^{-1}}\cdot\mathbf{X}, it can usually be fused into the previous operator [44, 46]. Since the quantization function is not differentiable, we are not able to directly optimize the problem with vanilla backpropagation. There are some techniques relying on approximated gradients [3, 12], which we found still suffers from unstable convergence.
items.zh: 这里Q表示权重量化函数（例如，组大小为128的INT3/INT4量化），W是FP16中的原始权重，X是从小校准集缓存的输入特征（我们从预训练数据集中取一个小校准集，以避免过拟合到特定任务）。s是逐（输入）通道缩放因子；对于s⁻¹·X，通常可以融合到前一个算子中[44, 46]。由于量化函数不可微，我们无法直接使用普通反向传播优化该问题。有一些技术依赖于近似梯度[3, 12]，但我们发现它们仍然存在收敛不稳定的问题。

items.en: To make the process more stable, we define a search space for the optimal scale by analyzing the factors that will affect the choice of scaling factor. As shown in the last section, the saliency of weight channels is actually determined by the activation scale (thus “activation-awareness”). Therefore, we simply use a very simple search space:
items.zh: 为了使过程更稳定，我们通过分析影响缩放因子选择的因素来定义最优缩放因子的搜索空间。如上一节所示，权重通道的显著性实际上由激活尺度决定（因此是“激活感知”）。因此，我们使用一个非常简单的搜索空间：

items.en: 𝐬𝐬\mathbf{s} is only related to the magnitude of activation 𝐬𝐗subscript𝐬𝐗\mathbf{s_{X}}, and we use a single hyper-parameter α𝛼\alpha to balance between the protection of salient and non-salient channels. We can find the best α𝛼\alpha by a fast grid search over the interval of [0,1]01[0,1] (00 means we do not scale; 111 corresponds to the most aggressive scaling). We further apply weight clipping also by minimizing the MSE error, since clipping the weights can further help to reduce Δ′superscriptΔ′\Delta^{{}^{\prime}} in Equation 2; thus reducing quantization error. We provide an ablation study on OPT models under INT3-g128 quantization in Table 3; AWQ consistently outperforms round-to-nearest quantization (RTN) and achieves comparable performance as mixed-precision (1% FP16) while being more hardware-friendly.
items.zh: s仅与激活幅度s_X相关，我们使用单个超参数α来平衡显著和非显著通道的保护。我们可以通过在[0,1]区间内进行快速网格搜索找到最佳α（0表示不缩放；1对应最激进的缩放）。我们还通过最小化MSE误差应用权重裁剪，因为裁剪权重有助于进一步减小公式2中的Δ'，从而减少量化误差。我们在表3中对OPT模型在INT3-g128量化下进行了消融研究；AWQ始终优于四舍五入量化（RTN），并达到与混合精度（1% FP16）相当的性能，同时更硬件友好。

items.en: Advantages. Our method does not rely on any regression [14] or backpropagation, which is required by many quantization-aware training methods. It has minimal reliance on the calibration set since we only measure the average magnitude per channel, thus preventing over-fitting (Figure 6). Therefore, our method requires fewer data for the quantization process and can preserve LLMs’ knowledge outside of the calibration set’s distribution. See Section 3.3 for more details.
items.zh: 优势。我们的方法不依赖任何回归[14]或反向传播，这是许多量化感知训练方法所必需的。它对校准集的依赖最小，因为我们只测量每个通道的平均幅度，从而防止过拟合（图6）。因此，我们的方法需要更少的数据进行量化过程，并能保留LLM在校准集分布之外的知识。更多细节见第3.3节。

items.en: We focus on weight-only grouped quantization in this work. As shown in previous work [10, 14], grouped quantization is always helpful for improving performance/model size trade-off. We used a group size of 128 throughout the work, except otherwise specified. We focus on INT4/INT3 quantization since they are able to mostly preserve the LLMs’ performance [10]. For AWQ, we used a small calibration set from the Pile [15] dataset in order not to overfit to a specific downstream domain. We used a grid size of 20 to search for the optimal α𝛼\alpha in Equation 4.
items.zh: 本文主要关注仅权重的分组量化。如先前工作[10, 14]所示，分组量化始终有助于改善性能/模型大小的权衡。除非另有说明，我们在整个工作中使用分组大小为128。我们主要关注INT4/INT3量化，因为它们能够基本保持LLM的性能[10]。对于AWQ，我们使用来自Pile[15]数据集的小型校准集，以避免过拟合到特定下游领域。我们使用网格大小为20来搜索公式4中的最优α。

items.en: We benchmarked our method on LLaMA [38] and OPT [49] families. There are other open LLMs like BLOOM [34], but they are generally worse in quality, so we do not include them in our study. We further benchmark an instruction-tuned model Vicuna [6] and visual language models OpenFlamingo-9B [2] and LLaVA-13B [26] to demonstrate the generability of our method.
items.zh: 我们在LLaMA[38]和OPT[49]系列上对我们的方法进行了基准测试。还有其他开源LLM，如BLOOM[34]，但它们的质量普遍较差，因此我们未将其纳入研究。我们还进一步对指令微调模型Vicuna[6]以及视觉语言模型OpenFlamingo-9B[2]和LLaVA-13B[26]进行了基准测试，以展示我们方法的泛化性。

items.en: Following previous literature [9, 46, 14, 10, 47], we mainly profiled the quantized models on language modeling tasks (perplexity evaluation on WikiText-2 [27]) since perplexity can stably reflect the LLM’s performance [10].
items.zh: 遵循先前文献[9, 46, 14, 10, 47]，我们主要在语言建模任务上评估量化模型（在WikiText-2[27]上的困惑度评估），因为困惑度能稳定反映LLM的性能[10]。

items.en: Our primary baseline is vanilla round-to-nearest quantization (RTN). It is actually quite strong when using a small group size like 128 [14, 10]. We also compare with a state-of-the-art method GPTQ [14] for LLM weight quantization. For GPTQ, we also compare with an updated version that uses a “reorder” trick (denoted as GPTQ-Reorder or GPTQ-R). Other techniques like ZeroQuant [47], AdaRound [28], and BRECQ [23] rely on backpropagation to update the quantized weights, which may not easily scale up to large model sizes; they also do not outperform GPTQ [14], thus not included for study.
items.zh: 我们的主要基线是简单的最近舍入量化（RTN）。当使用较小的分组大小（如128）时，它实际上相当强大[14, 10]。我们还与LLM权重量化的最先进方法GPTQ[14]进行了比较。对于GPTQ，我们还比较了使用“重排序”技巧的更新版本（记为GPTQ-Reorder或GPTQ-R）。其他技术如ZeroQuant[47]、AdaRound[28]和BRECQ[23]依赖反向传播来更新量化权重，这可能难以扩展到大型模型；它们也未优于GPTQ[14]，因此未纳入研究。

items.en: We focus our study on LLaMA models (LLaMA [38] and Llama-2 [39]) due to their superior performance compared to other open-source LLMs [49, 34]; it is also the foundation of many popular open-source models [36, 6]. We evaluate the perplexity before and after quantization in Table 4. We can see that AWQ consistently outperforms round-to-nearest (RTN) and GPTQ [14] (w/ and w/o reordering) across different model scales (7B-70B) and generations.
items.zh: 我们将研究重点放在LLaMA模型（LLaMA[38]和Llama-2[39]）上，因为与其他开源LLM[49, 34]相比，它们性能更优；它们也是许多流行开源模型的基础[36, 6]。我们在表4中评估了量化前后的困惑度。可以看出，AWQ在不同模型规模（7B-70B）和代际上始终优于最近舍入（RTN）和GPTQ[14]（无论是否重排序）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Comparing INT3-g128 quantized Vicuna models with FP16 counterparts under GPT-4 evaluation protocol [6]. More winning cases (in blue) indicate better performance. AWQ consistently improves the quantized performance compared to RTN and GPTQ [14], showing generalization to instruction-tuned models.
items.capZh: 图2：在GPT-4评估协议[6]下，比较INT3-g128量化的Vicuna模型与FP16对应模型。更多获胜案例（蓝色）表示性能更优。与RTN和GPTQ[14]相比，AWQ持续改善量化性能，展示了其对指令微调模型的泛化能力。

items.en: Instruction tuning can significantly improve the models’ performance and usability [42, 33, 31, 8]. It has become an essential procedure before model deployment. We further benchmark our method’s performance on a popular instruction-tuned model Vicuna [6] in Figure 2. We used the GPT-4 score to evaluate the quantized models’ performance against the FP16 counterpart on 80 sample questions [6]. We compare the responses with both orders (quantized-FP16, FP16-quantized) to get rid of the ordering effect (we found GPT-4 tends to increase the rating of the first input), leading to 160 trials. AWQ consistently improves the INT3-g128 quantized Vicuna models over RTN and GPTQ under both scales (7B and 13B), demonstrating the generability to instruction-tuned models.
items.zh: 指令微调能显著提升模型的性能和可用性[42, 33, 31, 8]，已成为模型部署前的必要步骤。我们在图2中进一步评估了方法在流行指令微调模型Vicuna[6]上的性能。我们使用GPT-4评分来评估量化模型相对于FP16对应模型在80个样本问题上的性能[6]。我们比较了两种顺序（量化-FP16，FP16-量化）的响应，以消除顺序效应（我们发现GPT-4倾向于提高第一个输入的评分），共进行160次试验。AWQ在两种规模（7B和13B）下均持续改善INT3-g128量化的Vicuna模型，优于RTN和GPTQ，展示了其对指令微调模型的泛化能力。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Qualitative results of quantized OpenFlamingo-9B [2] on COCO captioning dataset (4-shot, INT4-g128 quantization). Our method significantly improves the captioning quality compared to the round-to-nearest (RTN) baseline. We color the text to show the correct or wrong captions.
items.capZh: 图3：量化后的OpenFlamingo-9B[2]在COCO字幕数据集上的定性结果（4-shot，INT4-g128量化）。与最近舍入（RTN）基线相比，我们的方法显著提高了字幕质量。我们用颜色标注正确或错误的字幕文本。

items.en: Large multi-modal models (LMMs) or visual language models (VLMs) are LLMs augmented with vision inputs [1, 22, 21, 11, 48, 26]. Such models are able to perform text generation conditioned on image/video inputs. Since our method does not have the overfitting issue to the calibration set, it can be directly applied to VLMs to provide accurate and efficient quantization. We perform experiments with the OpenFlamingo-9B model [2] (an open-source reproduction of [1]) on COCO captioning [5] dataset (Table 5). We measured the average performance of 5k samples under different few-shot settings. We only quantize the language part of the model since it dominates the model size. AWQ outperforms existing methods under zero-shot and various few-shot settings, demonstrating the generability to different modalities and in-context learning workloads. It reduces the quantization degradation (32-shot) from 4.57 to 1.17 under INT4-g128, providing 4×\times model size reduction with negligible performance loss. We further provide some qualitative captioning results in Figure 3 to show our advantage over RTN. Our method provides a push-the-button solution for LMM/VLM quantization. It is the first study of VLM low-bit quantization to the best of our knowledge.
items.zh: 大型多模态模型（LMM）或视觉语言模型（VLM）是增强视觉输入的LLM[1, 22, 21, 11, 48, 26]。这类模型能够根据图像/视频输入生成文本。由于我们的方法不存在对校准集的过拟合问题，因此可以直接应用于VLM以提供准确高效的量化。我们在COCO字幕[5]数据集上使用OpenFlamingo-9B模型[2]（[1]的开源复现）进行了实验（表5）。我们测量了5k个样本在不同少样本设置下的平均性能。我们仅量化模型的语言部分，因为其主导模型大小。AWQ在零样本和各种少样本设置下均优于现有方法，展示了其在不同模态和上下文学习工作负载上的泛化能力。它将量化退化（32-shot）从4.57降低到1.17（INT4-g128），在性能损失可忽略的情况下实现了4倍的模型大小缩减。我们还在图3中提供了一些定性字幕结果，以展示我们相对于RTN的优势。我们的方法为LMM/VLM量化提供了一键式解决方案。据我们所知，这是首个关于VLM低位量化的研究。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Visual reasoning examples from LLaVA-13B model [26]. AWQ improves over the round-to-nearest (RTN) baseline, providing more reasonable answers. We color the text to show the correct or wrong responses.
items.capZh: 图4：LLaVA-13B模型[26]的视觉推理示例。AWQ优于最近舍入（RTN）基线，提供更合理的答案。我们用颜色标注正确或错误的响应文本。

items.en: We further provide some qualitative visual reasoning examples of the LLaVA-13B [26] model in Figure 4. AWQ improves the responses compared to the round-to-nearest (RTN) baseline for INT4-g128 quantization, leading to more reasonable answers. In this first example, the AWQ model can understand the meme as it resembles the Earth when looking from space, while RTN produces wrong descriptions (marked in red). In the second example, AWQ correctly answers the question (the artist of the painting), while RTN does not provide any information about the artist. In the last example, RTN falsely points out a bird in the picture, while AWQ provides more information by noticing the image is taken in a mountain area. AWQ improves the visual reasoning ability of VLMs by reducing factual errors in the responses; RTN is not good enough even for 4 bits.
items.zh: 我们还在图4中提供了LLaVA-13B[26]模型的一些定性视觉推理示例。对于INT4-g128量化，AWQ改善了响应质量，相比最近舍入（RTN）基线提供了更合理的答案。在第一个示例中，AWQ模型能理解该梗图类似于从太空看地球，而RTN产生了错误的描述（标红）。在第二个示例中，AWQ正确回答了问题（画作的艺术家），而RTN未提供任何关于艺术家的信息。在最后一个示例中，RTN错误地指出图片中有一只鸟，而AWQ通过注意到图片是在山区拍摄的提供了更多信息。AWQ通过减少响应中的事实错误提高了VLM的视觉推理能力；RTN即使对于4位量化也不够好。

items.en: We further quantize LLM to INT2 to accommodate limited device memory (Table 6). RTN completely fails, and AWQ brings significant perplexity improvement on top of GPTQ, though there is still a performance gap compared to FP16. Our method is orthogonal to GPTQ. We can combine our method with GPTQ to further improve the INT2 quantization performance, making it a more practical setting.
items.zh: 我们进一步将LLM量化到INT2以适应有限的设备内存（表6）。RTN完全失败，而AWQ在GPTQ基础上带来了显著的困惑度改善，尽管与FP16相比仍存在性能差距。我们的方法与GPTQ正交。我们可以将我们的方法与GPTQ结合，以进一步改善INT2量化性能，使其成为更实用的设置。

items.capEn: Figure 5: AWQ provides a turn-key solution to transform the theoretical memory footprint reduction into a quantifiable speedup. As a result, AWQ is up to 3.9×\times and 3.5×\times faster than the FP16 implementation from Huggingface on 4090 (desktop GPU) and Orin (mobile GPU), respectively. AWQ also democratizes Llama-2-13B deployment on laptop GPUs (4070) with merely 8GB memory.
items.capZh: 图5：AWQ提供了一键式解决方案，将理论内存占用减少转化为可量化的加速。因此，在4090（桌面GPU）和Orin（移动GPU）上，AWQ比Huggingface的FP16实现分别快3.9倍和3.5倍。AWQ还使得Llama-2-13B能够在仅8GB内存的笔记本GPU（4070）上部署。

items.en: In Figure 5, we demonstrate the system acceleration results for AWQ. We optimize both linear layers and layers that do not have quantized weights. We conduct benchmarking experiments on RTX 4090 (desktop GPU), RTX 4070 (laptop GPU) and Jetson Orin (mobile GPU). We perform batch size = 1 inference for all LLMs using a fixed prompt length of 4 tokens. We generate 200 tokens for each inference run and calculate the median latency as the final result. As in Figure 5(a), our system brings 2.7-3.9×\times speedup to three families of LLMs (Llama-2, MPT and Falcon) on 4090 compared with the Huggingface FP16 implementation. Notably, on the laptop 4070 GPU with only 8GB memory, we are still able to run Llama-2-13B models at 33 tokens / second, while the FP16 implementation cannot fit 7B models.
items.zh: 在图5中，我们展示了AWQ的系统加速结果。我们优化了线性层和没有量化权重的层。我们在RTX 4090（桌面GPU）、RTX 4070（笔记本GPU）和Jetson Orin（移动GPU）上进行了基准测试。我们对所有LLM使用固定提示长度4个token进行批量大小为1的推理。每次推理生成200个token，并计算中位数延迟作为最终结果。如图5(a)所示，在4090上，我们的系统相比Huggingface FP16实现，为三个LLM系列（Llama-2、MPT和Falcon）带来了2.7-3.9倍的加速。值得注意的是，在仅8GB内存的笔记本4070 GPU上，我们仍能以33 token/秒的速度运行Llama-2-13B模型，而FP16实现甚至无法容纳7B模型。

items.en: Our system also exhibits promising performance on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin (32GB). As shown in Figure 5(b), our system achieves an interactive processing rate of 33 tokens per second when running Llama-2 models. Thanks to AWQ, even larger models such as MPT-30B can operate smoothly on this resource-constrained edge device, delivering a processing speed of 7.8 tokens per second. It’s worth noting that we implement the forward pass for all AWQ models using native PyTorch APIs, and this code is reused across various GPU architectures. Consequently, our system provides the best of both worlds: state-of-the-art inference speed and exceptional extensibility.
items.zh: 我们的系统在NVIDIA Jetson Orin（32GB）上也表现出色。如图5(b)所示，运行Llama-2模型时，我们的系统实现了33 token/秒的交互式处理速率。得益于AWQ，即使是更大的模型如MPT-30B也能在此资源受限的边缘设备上流畅运行，处理速度达7.8 token/秒。值得注意的是，我们使用原生PyTorch API实现了所有AWQ模型的前向传播，并且这些代码可在各种GPU架构上复用。因此，我们的系统兼具两方面的优势：最先进的推理速度和卓越的可扩展性。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Left: AWQ needs a much smaller calibration set to reach a good quantized performance. It can achieve better perplexity using 10×\times smaller calibration set compared to GPTQ. Right: Our method is more robust to the calibration set distribution. Overall, using the same calibration and evaluation distribution works the best (PubMed-PubMed, Enron-Enron). But when using a different calibration distribution (PubMed-Enron, Enron-PubMed), AWQ only increases the perplexity by 0.5-0.6, while GPTQ has 2.3-4.9 worse perplexity. All experiments are done with the OPT-6.7B model under INT3-g128 quantization.
items.capZh: 图6：左图：AWQ需要更小的校准集即可达到良好的量化性能。与GPTQ相比，使用小10倍的校准集即可获得更好的困惑度。右图：我们的方法对校准集分布更鲁棒。总体而言，使用相同的校准和评估分布效果最佳（PubMed-PubMed，Enron-Enron）。但当使用不同的校准分布时（PubMed-Enron，Enron-PubMed），AWQ的困惑度仅增加0.5-0.6，而GPTQ的困惑度恶化2.3-4.9。所有实验均在OPT-6.7B模型上进行，采用INT3-g128量化。

items.en: Our method requires a smaller calibration set since we do not rely on regression/backpropagation; we only measure the average activation scale from the calibration set, which is data-efficient. To demonstrate the idea, we compare the perplexity of the OPT-6.7B model with INT3-g128 quantization in Figure 6 (a). AWQ needs a much smaller calibration to reach a good quantized performance; it can achieve better perplexity using 10×\times smaller calibration set compared to GPTQ (16 sequences v.s. 192 sequences).
items.zh: 我们的方法需要更小的校准集，因为我们不依赖回归/反向传播；我们仅从校准集测量平均激活尺度，这具有数据效率。为说明这一点，我们在图6(a)中比较了OPT-6.7B模型在INT3-g128量化下的困惑度。AWQ需要更小的校准集即可达到良好的量化性能；与GPTQ相比，使用小10倍的校准集（16个序列 vs 192个序列）即可获得更好的困惑度。

items.en: Our method is less sensitive to the calibration set distribution since we only measure the average activation scale from the calibration set, which is more generalizable across different dataset distributions. We further benchmarked the effect of the different calibration set distributions in Figure 6(b). We took two subsets from the Pile dataset [15]: PubMed Abstracts and Enron Emails [20]. We use each of the subsets as the calibration set and evaluate the quantized model on both sets (the calibration and evaluation sets are split with no overlapping; we used 1k samples for evaluation). Overall, using the same calibration and evaluation distribution works the best (PubMed-PubMed, Enron-Enron). But when using a different calibration distribution (PubMed-Enron, Enron-PubMed), AWQ only increases the perplexity by 0.5-0.6, while GPTQ has 2.3-4.9 worse perplexity. This demonstrates the robustness of AWQ to the calibration set distribution.
items.zh: 我们的方法对校准集分布不太敏感，因为我们仅从校准集测量平均激活尺度，这在不同数据集分布上更具泛化性。我们进一步在图6(b)中评估了不同校准集分布的影响。我们从Pile数据集[15]中选取了两个子集：PubMed摘要和Enron电子邮件[20]。我们将每个子集作为校准集，并在两个集合上评估量化模型（校准集和评估集无重叠；我们使用1k样本进行评估）。总体而言，使用相同的校准和评估分布效果最佳（PubMed-PubMed，Enron-Enron）。但当使用不同的校准分布时（PubMed-Enron，Enron-PubMed），AWQ的困惑度仅增加0.5-0.6，而GPTQ的困惑度恶化2.3-4.9。这展示了AWQ对校准集分布的鲁棒性。

items.en: Quantization reduces the bit-precision of deep learning models [17, 19, 29, 41, 28, 25], which helps to reduce the model size and accelerate inference. Quantization techniques generally fall into two categories: quantization-aware training (QAT, which relies on backpropagation to update the quantized weights) [3, 16, 30, 7] and post-training quantization [19, 29, 28] (PTQ, usually training-free). The QAT methods cannot easily scale up to large models like LLMs. Therefore, people usually use PTQ methods to quantize LLMs.
items.zh: 量化降低了深度学习模型的位精度[17, 19, 29, 41, 28, 25]，有助于减小模型大小并加速推理。量化技术通常分为两类：量化感知训练（QAT，依赖反向传播更新量化权重）[3, 16, 30, 7]和训练后量化[19, 29, 28]（PTQ，通常无需训练）。QAT方法难以扩展到像LLM这样的大型模型。因此，人们通常使用PTQ方法来量化LLM。

items.en: People study two settings for LLM quantization: (1) W8A8 quantization, where both activation and weights are quantized to INT8 [9, 46, 47, 45, 43]; (2) Low-bit weight-only quantization (e.g., W4A16), where only weights are quantized into low-bit integers [14, 10, 35, 32]. We focus on the second setting in this work since it not only reduces the hardware barrier (requiring a smaller memory size) but also speeds up the token generation (remedies memory-bound workload). Apart from the vanilla round-to-nearest baseline (RTN), GPTQ [14] is the closest to our work. However, the reconstruction process of GPTQ leads to an over-fitting issue to the calibration set and may not preserve the generalist abilities of LLMs for other modalities and domains. It also requires a reordering trick to work for some models (e.g., LLaMA-7B [38] and OPT-66B [49]).
items.zh: 人们研究LLM量化的两种设置：（1）W8A8量化，其中激活和权重均量化为INT8[9, 46, 47, 45, 43]；（2）低位仅权重量化（例如W4A16），其中仅权重量化为低位整数[14, 10, 35, 32]。本文关注第二种设置，因为它不仅降低了硬件门槛（需要更小的内存大小），还加速了token生成（缓解了内存受限的工作负载）。除了简单的最近舍入基线（RTN）外，GPTQ[14]与我们的工作最为接近。然而，GPTQ的重构过程会导致对校准集的过拟合问题，可能无法保持LLM在其他模态和领域的通用能力。它还需要重排序技巧才能在某些模型上工作（例如LLaMA-7B[38]和OPT-66B[49]）。

items.en: Low-bit quantized LLMs have been a popular setting to reduce inference costs. There are some system supports to achieve a practical speed-up. GPTQ [14] provides INT3 kernels for OPT models and GPTQ-for-LLaMA extends kernel support for INT4 reordered quantization with the help of Triton [37]. FlexGen [35] and llama.cpp***https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp perform group-wise INT4 quantization to reduce I/O costs and offloading. FasterTransformer†††https://github.com/NVIDIA/FasterTransformer implements FP16×\timesINT4 GEMM for weight-only per-tensor quantization but does not support group quantization. LUT-GEMM [32] performs bitwise computation on GPU CUDA cores with the help of lookup tables. AWQ kernels are adaptively executed on both tensor cores and CUDA cores, suitable for both context and generation phases in LLM inference. Consequently, we run state-of-the-art LLaMA models with 3.2-3.3×\times speedup over the FP16 implementation from Huggingface.
items.zh: 低位量化的大语言模型已成为降低推理成本的流行设置。一些系统支持实现了实际加速。GPTQ [14] 为 OPT 模型提供了 INT3 内核，GPTQ-for-LLaMA 借助 Triton [37] 扩展了对 INT4 重排序量化的内核支持。FlexGen [35] 和 llama.cpp***https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp 执行分组 INT4 量化以减少 I/O 成本和卸载。FasterTransformer†††https://github.com/NVIDIA/FasterTransformer 实现了 FP16×INT4 GEMM 用于仅权重的逐张量量化，但不支持分组量化。LUT-GEMM [32] 借助查找表在 GPU CUDA 核心上执行按位计算。AWQ 内核自适应地在张量核心和 CUDA 核心上执行，适用于大语言模型推理的上下文和生成阶段。因此，我们运行最先进的 LLaMA 模型，相比 Huggingface 的 FP16 实现实现了 3.2-3.3 倍加速。

items.en: In this work, we propose Activation-aware Weight Quantization (AWQ), a simple yet effective method for low-bit weight-only LLM compression AWQ is based on the observation that weights are not equally important in LLMs and performs per-channel scaling to reduce the quantization loss of salient weights. AWQ does not over-fit the calibration set and preserves the generalist abilities of LLMs in various domains and modalities. It outperforms existing work on language modeling and can be applicable to instruction-tuned LMs and multi-modal LMs. Our system implementation further translates the theoretical memory savings achieved by AWQ into 3.2-3.3×\times measured speedups over the FP16 implementations from Huggingface on desktop and mobile GPUs, democratizing LLM deployment on the edge.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了激活感知权重量化（AWQ），一种简单而有效的低位仅权重大语言模型压缩方法。AWQ 基于观察：大语言模型中权重并非同等重要，并执行逐通道缩放以减少显著权重的量化损失。AWQ 不过度拟合校准集，并保留了大语言模型在各个领域和模态中的通用能力。它在语言建模上优于现有工作，并可应用于指令调优的语言模型和多模态语言模型。我们的系统实现进一步将 AWQ 实现的理论内存节省转化为在桌面和移动 GPU 上相比 Huggingface 的 FP16 实现的 3.2-3.3 倍实测加速，使大语言模型在边缘设备上的部署民主化。

items.en: We thank MIT AI Hardware Program, National Science Foundation, NVIDIA Academic Partnership Award, MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab, Amazon and MIT Science Hub, Qualcomm Innovation Fellowship, Microsoft Turing Academic Program for supporting this research.
items.zh: 我们感谢 MIT AI Hardware Program、National Science Foundation、NVIDIA Academic Partnership Award、MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab、Amazon 和 MIT Science Hub、Qualcomm Innovation Fellowship、Microsoft Turing Academic Program 对本研究的支持。
